title: Cobbleworks
description: Cobbleworks is an attempt to remix the best balance between Cobblemon and Create, achieving a harmonious blend of the two.
body:
# 🌟 CobbleWorks – Pokémon Meets Mechanical Mastery in Minecraft
CobbleWorks is a carefully crafted Minecraft modpack that merges the vibrant world of Cobblemon with the powerful automation and engineering possibilities of the Create mod. Whether you’re a Pokémon Trainer, a redstone tinkerer, or a factory visionary—this pack is built for you.

## 🔍 What is CobbleWorks?
CobbleWorks combines two of the most popular gameplay concepts in the Minecraft modding scene:

- The creature-catching excitement of Pokémon
- The creative complexity of kinetic engineering and automation

This fusion creates a seamless gameplay experience focused on exploration, strategy, and creativity—all within the familiar blocky world of Minecraft.

## ⚙️ What’s Included?
### 🐾 Cobblemon Integration
Catch, train, and battle Pokémon in an immersive Minecraft-native experience. No external emulators or game ROMs required—just you, the world, and hundreds of Pokémon to discover.

### ⚙️ Create Mod Tech Stack
Design intricate machines using mechanical power, belts, cogs, and contraptions. Automate crafting, mining, farming, and transportation with the incredible flexibility of Create.

### 🔁 Synergistic Gameplay
The modpack is balanced to allow players to enjoy both systems together. Build a Pokécenter powered by steam engines, or automate Apricorn harvesting—possibilities are endless.

### 🌐 Multiplayer-Ready
Fully server-compatible, making it perfect for shared adventures. Bring your friends, trade Pokémon, and co-build factories or settlements.

### 🎨 Visual & QoL Enhancements
Optional support for shaders, optimized world generation, and a curated selection of Quality of Life mods—carefully chosen to enhance, not bloat, the experience.

## 🎯 Why Choose CobbleWorks?
If you love:

- Pokémon-style exploration
- Building machines and automation
- Creative freedom with a progression loop
- Multiplayer adventures

Then CobbleWorks is made for you.

Unlike tech-only or adventure-only packs, CobbleWorks strikes a unique balance between relaxing gameplay, immersive worldbuilding, and mechanical ingenuity.

## 📌 Important Information
- ✅ Requires Minecraft Forge (see specific version in the Releases tab)
- ✅ No cheats, hacks, or unfair advantages—Multiplayer-safe
- ✅ All mods are properly licensed and attributed
- ❌ No invasive data tracking or remote servers
- 💻 Includes performance mods for a smoother experience

_Want a version with minimal dependencies or low-end hardware compatibility? Or maybe a server pack? Let us know on our community page!_
